'''Kilon Tarlok''' was an elderly [[Near-Human]] who was responsible for administering [[Terman Station]]. He was unaware that [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] paid his salary.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'' {{1stm}}
